lsp.justification: The answer correctly identifies the 14 whole functions in src/ap/ieee802_11.c and all 9 partial functions, but it misses the GT’s major required whole-file Makefile gate for src/common/sae.c, omitting 35 additional whole CONFIG_SAE-dependent functions. That leaves 23 reported functions versus the correct 58, so it is badly incomplete despite the correct subset.
